CustomField.formula: IF( OR( AND( ISPICKVAL(DRC_NBC_Type__c, "Domestic"), TEXT(Account.BillingStateCode) <> "MH" ), AND( ISPICKVAL(DRC_NBC_Sample_Type__c, "Paid Sample"), TEXT( Account.BillingStateCode ) <> "MH" ) ), DRC_NBC_Total_Amount__c * VALUE($Label.DRC_NBC_IGST_Tax_Rate), 0 )
CustomField.label: IGST
